name: openshift-ai-skills
description: Add and configure Red Hat OpenShift AI components in your project. Interactive skills for model serving, pipelines, model registry, RAG, training, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Deploy and configure Red Hat OpenShift AI components
interface.longDescription: Analyze your project for ML/AI patterns, recommend OpenShift AI components, generate manifests, wire them into your application, write tests, and verify deployments.
defaultPrompt: Analyze my project and recommend OpenShift AI components
Add KServe model serving to my project
Add a model registry to my project
